label: Normal Rain
description: A typical warm-season rain event with manageable runoff and balanced storage.

label: Extreme Storm
description: A 1-hour cloudburst at 2.6 in/hr — just past Atlanta's 2.5 in/hr drain design — that overloads paved areas, drains, and low-lying corridors.

label: Drought Mode
description: Low rainfall after a dry spell, prioritizing storage, trees, parks, and ecological recharge.

label: AI Predicted Drought
description: A predictive mode that conserves more water before drought conditions fully arrive.
